title: rpl/dodag.py: hysteresis logic is inverted and confusing
description:
src/lichen/rpl/dodag.py:151-158 has parent selection hysteresis logic:
    if best_cost > current_cost - self.parent_switch_threshold:
        best, best_cost = current, current_cost

The conditional reads 'if best is worse than current minus threshold, keep current.' The subtraction direction is non-obvious. RFC 6550 MRHOF phrases this as 'switch only if improvement exceeds threshold.'

Fix: Rewrite as: improvement = current_cost - best_cost; if improvement < self.parent_switch_threshold: best = current. Add comment citing RFC 6550 section 3.6.
